languages.text: "Да. Только в корни мы не ходили. Все прямо в Клети порешали. Вышли на бой шестеро, остался я один. Не навалились они на меня кучей, может и пощадил бы кого..."
"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."
languages.original_text: "Да. Только в корни мы не ходили. Все прямо в Клети порешали. Вышли на бой шестеро, остался я один. Не навалились они на меня кучей, может и пощадил бы кого..."

traits.locale_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. Had they not swarmed me, I might have spared a life or two."
"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. Had they not swarmed me, I might have spared a life or two."

"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."
"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."

languages.text: "Ja. Allerdings haben wir uns nicht in die Wurzeln gewagt. Wir haben alles hier im Käfig geregelt. Sechs von uns zogen in die Schlacht. Nur ich habe überlebt. Hätten sie mich nicht umschwärmt, hätte ich vielleicht das ein oder andere Leben retten können."
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

traits.locale_text: "Ja. Allerdings haben wir uns nicht in die Wurzeln gewagt. Wir haben alles hier im Käfig geregelt. Sechs von uns zogen in die Schlacht. Nur ich habe überlebt. Hätten sie mich nicht umschwärmt, hätte ich vielleicht das ein oder andere Leben retten können."

languages.text: « Oui. Sauf que nous ne sommes pas allés dans les racines. Nous avons réglé la question ici même, dans la Cage. Six d'entre nous se sont affrontés en combat. Je suis le seul à avoir survécu. Si les autres ne m'avaient pas sauté dessus, j'aurais peut-être réussi à en épargner un ou deux. »
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

traits.locale_text: « Oui. Sauf que nous ne sommes pas allés dans les racines. Nous avons réglé la question ici même, dans la Cage. Six d'entre nous se sont affrontés en combat. Je suis le seul à avoir survécu. Si les autres ne m'avaient pas sauté dessus, j'aurais peut-être réussi à en épargner un ou deux. »

languages.text: «Sí, pero no llegamos a adentrarnos en las raíces. Lo zanjamos todo ahí mismo, en la Jaula. Seis de nosotros salimos para luchar. Solo yo sobreviví. Si no me hubiesen atacado todos a la vez, quizá habría podido salvar a alguien más».
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, pero no llegamos a adentrarnos en las raíces. Lo zanjamos todo ahí mismo, en la Jaula. Seis de nosotros salimos para luchar. Solo yo sobreviví. Si no me hubiesen atacado todos a la vez, quizá habría podido salvar a alguien más».

languages.text: "Evet. Biz köklere gitmedik. Her şeyi Kafes'te hallettik. Altı kişi savaştık. Geriye bir tek ben kaldım. Etrafımı sarmasalarda bazısının canını bağışlayabilirdim belki."
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

traits.locale_text: "Evet. Biz köklere gitmedik. Her şeyi Kafes'te hallettik. Altı kişi savaştık. Geriye bir tek ben kaldım. Etrafımı sarmasalarda bazısının canını bağışlayabilirdim belki."

languages.text: “是的。只不过我们没有进入根系深处，在牢笼里就把事情解决了。我们六个出去迎战，最后就剩下我一个。要不是被那东西围住了，我或许还能多救几个人。”
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

traits.locale_text: “是的。只不过我们没有进入根系深处，在牢笼里就把事情解决了。我们六个出去迎战，最后就剩下我一个。要不是被那东西围住了，我或许还能多救几个人。”

languages.text: 「ええ、根元には行かなかった。籠の中で決着をつけた。6人が出て戦った。私は一人残った。彼らが襲ってこなければ、1、2人の命は助けることができたかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、根元には行かなかった。籠の中で決着をつけた。6人が出て戦った。私は一人残った。彼らが襲ってこなければ、1、2人の命は助けることができたかもしれない。」
